problem: It is currently $3\!:\!00\!:\!00 \text{ p.m.}$ What time will it be in $6666$ seconds?  (Enter the time in the format "HH:MM:SS", without including "am" or "pm".)

classified_questions.question: What is the total number of seconds in a minute?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: How many minutes are there in an hour?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you calculate how many minutes are in 6666 seconds? What is the quotient and the remainder?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How would you convert the minutes obtained in the previous step to hours and minutes? What is the resulting quotient and the remainder?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can you determine the time in the format "HH:MM:SS" after converting 6666 seconds to hours, minutes, and seconds?
classified_questions.label: b
